'''hafuju''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:squamella|squamella]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-f-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:squamella|squamella]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| hafuju
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæfijith|hæfijith]] || [[word:hæfijij|hæfijij]] || [[word:hæfijish|hæfijish]] || [[word:hæfiji|hæfiji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hafufujuth|hafufujuth]] || [[word:hafufujuj|hafufujuj]] || [[word:hafufujush|hafufujush]] || [[word:hafufuju|hafufuju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hafujuth|hafujuth]] || [[word:hafujuj|hafujuj]] || [[word:hafujush|hafujush]] || [[word:hafuju|hafuju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hafufjuth|hafufjuth]] || [[word:hafufjuj|hafufjuj]] || [[word:hafufjush|hafufjush]] || [[word:hafufjuf|hafufjuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hafujuthu|hafujuthu]] || [[word:hafujuju|hafujuju]] || [[word:hafujushu|hafujushu]] || [[word:hafujuku|hafujuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hafujuth|hafujuth]] || [[word:hafujuj|hafujuj]] || [[word:hafujush|hafujush]] || [[word:hafuju|hafuju]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hafujuthul|hafujuthul]] || [[word:hafujujul|hafujujul]] || [[word:hafujushul|hafujushul]] || [[word:hafujukul|hafujukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hafujuthuthu|hafujuthuthu]] || [[word:hafujujuju|hafujujuju]] || [[word:hafujushushu|hafujushushu]] || [[word:hafujuku|hafujuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hafujuthun|hafujuthun]] || [[word:hafujujun|hafujujun]] || [[word:hafujushun|hafujushun]] || [[word:hafujukun|hafujukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hafujuthuoro|hafujuthuoro]] || [[word:hafujujuoro|hafujujuoro]] || [[word:hafujushuoro|hafujushuoro]] || [[word:hafujukuoro|hafujukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
